name: Quiche Alla Roma
recipeIngredient: Green pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Combine eggs, salt, pepper, mustard, onion, and cheese in a bowl. Pour the mixture into the bottom of the shell.
Arrange tomatoes, pepper slices, and optional salami on top. Sprinkle with oregano.
Bake for 35 to 40 minutes until the pastry is cooked through and the egg is set.
